Conan.notes:
• Advantage on hit allows for a jump attack follow-up
• Cancel into Trust in Steel before attack by holding L1 during Start-Up
•Cancel into Kameo Throw or Shove before attacking by holding Forward+L1 during Start-Up 
• Cancel into This You Can Trust before attack with L2+R2 when fully charged

• Cancel into Trust in Steel before attack by holding L1 during Start-Up
•Cancel into Kameo Throw or Shove before attacking by holding Forward+L1 during Start-Up 
• Cancel into This You Can Trust before attack with L2+R2 when fully charged
• Can be +8 on block on a full charge
• Advantage on hit allows for a jump attack follow-up
• Parries High, Mid, and Overhead Attacks (not including jump attacks)
• Reflects most prokectiles in a random direction

• Costs 1 bar of super meter
• Reflects most projectiles
• On Hit, cancelable after 4th swing into basic attacks, special moves, fatal blow, and kameo summons at the cost of 1 bar

•  Costs 1 bar of super meter
• Advantage on hit allows for a jump attack follow up
•  Press 1 during start up for Destroyer's Drop

•  Press 1 during start up for Destroyer's Drop
•  Has Armor
•  Costs 1 bar of Super Meter

•  Occurs when far from opponent
•  Hold 3 to delay attack

•  Occurs when far from opponent
•  Hold 3 to delay attack
•  Has Armor
•  Costs 1 bar of Super Meter

•  Attack upon release of 3
•  Cancel attack with D+RT

•  Occurs when close to opponent
•  Hold 3 to delay attack

•  Occurs when close to opponent
•  Has Armor
•  Costs 1 bar of Super Meter
•  Hold 3 to delay attack

•  Attack upon release of 3
•  Cancel attack with D+RT

•  Has Armor
•  Costs 1 bar of Super Meter

•  Must be at 30% health or less
• Crom disdains weakness, Valhalla is not yours today
• Coats Conan in ritual blood for a duration
• Return to battle if defeated while bloodcoated

• Kameo must be available
• Cannot be performed with motaro
• Cannot be performed with Shujinko against Shang while Mimic:Form Stealer is active
• Cannot be performed by Shang after using Form Stealer

Baraka.notes: Install super. Slowly drains health, grants meter.

Havik.notes: Armored low launcher. Does 10 less damage since 4/1/2025.

Quan Chi.notes: Drains opponent meter, grants armor after a duration.
New attack. Mid, appears behind the enemy.

Raiden.notes: Stores Electric Orb charges. New move 1/21/2025.
Launches. Damage increases per stored charge. New move 1/21/2025.

Sub-Zero.notes: Tap BLK after EX for 2 additional Klones. Costs 2 bars total.
